wConstants public class ArgumentConfigurerDialog extends ComponentDialog implements ChangeListener This class is a modal dialog box for configuring the arguments of an entity. An instance of this class contains an instance of ArgumentConfigurer.

lass contains an instance of ArgumentConfigurer. The dialog is modal, so the statement that creates the dialog will not return until the user dismisses the dialog. Since: Ptolemy II 3.0 Version: $Id: ArgumentConfigurerDialog.java,v 1.16 2004/04
